overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at night. The character navigates from a sidewalk past pedestrians and vehicles, then through a street with military trucks and buses, finally entering a dirt area with burning wreckage and debris.

events.description: military transport truck passes by on the street to the right
ego begins following a large pedestrian in white clothing ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the concrete sidewalk following a large man in white clothes

notable_agents.action: large man in white vest and shorts walking ahead of ego on the sidewalk

entered.detail: weathered concrete industrial building with air conditioning units and barred windows
wet asphalt road reflecting street lights with moving vehicle traffic
large olive green military transport truck with six wheels and canvas cover
tall industrial street lamp with red warning lights at the top

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an urban sidewalk next to a concrete utility building, following a large man in white clothing. A military truck passes on the wet asphalt street to the right, and the area is illuminated by artificial street lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated sidewalk approaching burning wreckage area

events.description: burning wreckage on hillside becomes visible in the distance ahead
ego descends curb and crosses from sidewalk to street level

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk then crossing toward the street where military vehicles are parked near burning wreckage

notable_agents.action: military truck parked on the side of the road near the burning hill

entered.detail: low concrete barrier with graffiti separating the sidewalk from the street
hillside with multiple burning vehicle wrecks emitting orange flames and smoke

segments.scene_description: Walking along the elevated sidewalk, the character approaches a section where burning wreckage becomes visible on a hillside ahead. The character then descends to street level near parked military trucks, passing concrete barricades.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane street with heavy vehicle traffic and graffiti walls

events.description: navigating between parked military truck and moving traffic on the street
transit bus passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the street between parked and moving vehicles, passing a transit bus and black van

notable_agents.action: transit bus with blue interior lighting moving along the street
small black compact van driving past on the street

entered.detail: long dark transit bus with illuminated blue interior and multiple windows
concrete retaining wall covered in colorful graffiti murals and posters
small black compact van with headlights on

segments.scene_description: The character navigates along the asphalt street at road level, moving between parked military trucks and moving traffic. A transit bus and black van pass by on the right, while graffiti-covered walls line the street. The burning wreckage area grows closer ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: burning wreckage field with debris and garbage piles

events.description: entering dirt path with burning car wreckage and debris
moving past large piles of garbage bags and burning debris on the hillside

agents.ego_description: walking through the dirt path surrounded by burning cars, garbage piles, and shanty buildings

entered.detail: unpaved dirt trail with tire tracks, puddles, and scattered debris
destroyed vehicle engulfed in bright orange flames and thick smoke
large mounds of black garbage bags and scattered trash
dilapidated hillside structures with scattered lights and makeshift construction

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the paved street and enters a dirt path through a wreckage area. Burning car wrecks emit orange light on the left while large garbage piles line the right side. The path leads through debris and dilapidated hillside shanty buildings in a chaotic, fire-lit environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sterile urban corridor that gradually descends into a zone of military chaos and destruction. It begins on an elevated sidewalk beside a concrete utility building, trailing a man in white clothing while a military truck passes on the wet asphalt below. As the character continues forward, the view opens up to reveal burning wreckage smoldering on a hillside in the distance. The scene then shifts as the camera descends from the sidewalk to street level, passing through a gauntlet of concrete barricades and parked military vehicles. Finally, the movement leads directly toward the debris and fire of the wreckage-strewn area.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling urban street into a chaotic, fire-lit wasteland of wreckage. It begins at road level on an asphalt street, weaving between parked military trucks and passing traffic as a transit bus and black van glide by against a backdrop of graffiti-covered walls. As the character advances, the paved road gives way to a dirt path, shifting the environment from a structured city thoroughfare to a desolate debris field. The scene then opens into a wreckage area where burning car wrecks cast a flickering orange glow on the left, contrasted by towering piles of garbage on the right. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into this ruined landscape, navigating through scattered debris and dilapidated hillside shanty buildings.
